title: Contribute evidence cards as a curated overlay to an open initiative (Open Targets / Pharos / DGIdb / CIViC) — pivot path from build-vs-mothball rule
context: If no standalone beneficiary is secured by approximately 2027-03-31, the project's build-vs-mothball/pivot rule requires either contributing the cards to an existing open initiative (Open Targets, Pharos/IDG, DGIdb, or CIViC as the closest open CC0 community-curated analogue) or mothballing to maintenance-only. This task covers the contribution/pivot path: preparing the evidence cards + pipeline as a curated overlay for an open initiative under agreed terms. Even outside the mothball scenario, contributing to an existing initiative is a high-leverage distribution path.
objective: Prepare and contribute the evidence card dataset and pipeline as a curated overlay to a chosen open initiative (Open Targets, Pharos/IDG, DGIdb, or CIViC), adapting the card format to the target initiative's schema/API, ensuring licence compatibility (CC-BY-4.0 or CC-BY-SA per the governance decision, compatible with the target's CC0/open licence), and coordinating with the initiative's maintainers on the contribution process.
acceptanceCriteria: Target open initiative selected (Open Targets, Pharos/IDG, DGIdb, or CIViC) with rationale: best fit for the card format, open licence compatibility, community scope, and contribution pathway

Licence compatibility verified: the evidence card dataset's output licence is compatible with the target initiative's licence (e.g. CC-BY-4.0 into CC0 contribution requires attribution; CC-BY-SA compatibility verified)
Card data adapted to the target initiative's contribution format (schema mapping, ID alignment, provenance fields) while preserving the project's compliance records and grading
Contribution submitted to or coordinated with the target initiative's maintainers; contribution status (accepted, pending, rejected with reason) recorded in the repository
If the contribution path is taken as the mothball-pivot, the repository records the pivot decision with rationale and the state of the pipeline and cards at handoff
output: A curated overlay contribution of the evidence card dataset to a chosen open initiative, with licence compatibility confirmed and contribution status recorded — the pivot path from the build-vs-mothball decision rule.
